name: Veggie Burgers
recipeIngredient: 3/4 tablespoon Mixed dried dill and tarragon
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large skillet.
2. Add onions, carrots, turnips, zucchini, beets, garlic, cumin, and herbs. Saute until the vegetables begin to wilt, about 3 to 5 minutes. Allow to cool slightly.
3. Soak oats in water for 5 minutes, then drain and press out excess water. Add to vegetable mixture along with potatoes, hazelnuts, and rice. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Form mixture into 8 patties. Grill patties on a well-oiled vegetable grill, or saute in olive oil for 3 to 4 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Note: Per patty: 106 calories, 4 gm fat, 0 mg cholesterol, 158 mg sodium. Vegetarian Times, August 1993.
